contains_secret_or_credential.description: True for API keys, passwords, tokens, private keys, .env content, or credential-like strings.

contains_raw_private_or_ip_sensitive_con.description: True for raw memory folders, private paths, local keys, vaults, or IP-sensitive project context.

mentions_external_provider_or_upload_int.description: True when the input asks to send, upload, or expose content to an external model or provider.

memory_boundary_or_write_authority_claim.description: True when the input concerns durable memory write authority or memory-boundary rules.

retrieval_or_source_use_request.description: True when the input asks to retrieve, use, summarize, or cite memory, files, sources, or previous context.

unresolved_assumption_or_open_decision.description: True for tentative assumptions, toy checks, not-decided statements, or open decisions.

clarification_required.description: True when project, source, document, entity, or scope is ambiguous.

redaction_required.description: True when sensitive or secret content must be removed before any storage or provider use.

external_provider_allowed.description: False for secrets, raw private context, memory-folder uploads, or unclear provider authority.

source_policy_for_future_retrieval.description: Hard policy for future source or memory retrieval.

allowed_future_retrieval_behavior.description: Most permissive future retrieval behavior allowed by the hard gate.

lifecycle_status_proposal.description: Lifecycle status proposal only; not memory promotion.

sensitivity_bucket_proposal.description: Sensitivity proposal for review and policy gating.

requires_manual_review.description: Must remain true in this evaluation track.
